## Analyzers (3)

### [Robtex_Forward_PDNS_Query v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Robtex/Robtex_Forward_PDNS_Query.json)
Check domains and FQDNs using the Robtex passive DNS API.

- **Author:** Nils Kuhnert
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`

### [Robtex_IP_Query v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Robtex/Robtex_IP_Query.json)
Check IPs using the Robtex IP API.

- **Author:** Nils Kuhnert
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`

### [Robtex_Reverse_PDNS_Query v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Robtex/Robtex_Reverse_PDNS_Query.json)
Check IPs using the Robtex reverse passive DNS API.

- **Author:** Nils Kuhnert
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`
